summary: Innovative Principal Cloud Architect with 20+ years' experience leading multi-cloud transformation for public and private sectors. Expert in aligning technology with business strategy, delivering measurable results through team leadership and AI-driven solutions.

experiences.description:
Led transformative cloud initiatives for regulated clients.
Expanded global reach via multi-region deployments.
Accelerated revenue growth with emerging tech.
Shortened sales cycles across numerous accounts.

Automated cloud mgmt, 99.9% uptime.
Cut overhead 35%; secure data for 200+ endpoints.
DevOps/Docker: Deployments weeks-to-days.
RTO reduced 70%; AWS/OpenStack for 300+ users.

Migrated 10+ apps/100+ VMs zero-downtime.
30%+ cost cuts; hybrid cloud 40-50% faster.
Scalability 25% no CAPEX; 99.8% availability.

Cut costs 30%+ via automation; zero-downtime migration of 100+ VMs.
Enabled hybrid cloud (AWS/OpenStack) for 50% faster deployments and 60% more flexibility.

Handled auth/authz/session for MDS SUAS EMR app.
Enabled nationwide secure access across Brazil.

Built AWS/OpenStack cloud for 300+ users.
Achieved 99.7% availability.
DevOps/Docker: Deployments weeks to days.

Managed DCs for 20+ clients (SLAs >98%).
Led 8+ teams; downtime -45%.
250+ Linux servers; VMware/network security.
Full role history and details available on LinkedIn.

education.description:
Focus: Executive leadership, high-performance team management, innovation strategy, and
measurable corporate results.

education.degree: MBA in Artificial Intelligence for Business
education.description:
Specialized in AI strategy, Generative AI Professional, and MLOps to drive enterprise business
transformation via innovative, cloud-integrated AI solutions and data-driven outcomes.

Advanced studies in telecom systems, networking protocols, and infra design—delivered key
insights despite accident-related interruption.

BSc Network Management: Specialized in infrastructure design, telecom systems, and scalable
enterprise connectivity.

certifications.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2025 Multicloud Architect Professional
Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2024 Generative AI Professional

designChecks.feedback: File size cannot be determined from JSON, assuming it is less than 5MB.

structureChecks.label: Dates MM/YYYY
structureChecks.feedback: All dates (experience, education, certifications) are in the MM/YYYY format.

structureChecks.label: Standard headers
structureChecks.feedback: Standard section headers like 'summary', 'experiences', 'education', 'skills', 'certifications' are used.

structureChecks.label: Required sections
structureChecks.feedback: Summary, Experience, Education, and Skills sections are all present.

structureChecks.label: Contact info parseable
structureChecks.feedback: Email, phone, location, and LinkedIn are clearly provided and parseable.

structureChecks.label: Smart quotes/Em-dashes
structureChecks.feedback: No smart quotes or em-dashes detected in the provided text.

structureChecks.label: Old experiences (>10 years)
structureChecks.feedback: Experience from 03/2003 (Earlier Career) and 06/2011 (Embratel) are more than 10 years old. Consider removing or summarizing to focus on more recent and relevant milestones. (Impact: -20 points)

structureChecks.label: Expired certifications (>3 years)
structureChecks.feedback: Certification 'Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals' expired on 06/2020 and 'AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner' expired on 09/2019. Both are more than 3 years expired. Consider removing or listing as '(expired [DATE])'. (Impact: -10 points)

improvedBullets.original: Led transformative cloud initiatives for regulated clients.
improvedBullets.improved: Led 5+ transformative cloud initiatives for regulated clients, resulting in 15% faster project delivery and 10% cost savings.
improvedBullets.reason: Added quantifiable metrics (number of initiatives, percentage faster delivery, cost savings) to demonstrate impact using the STAR method.

improvedBullets.original: Handled auth/authz/session for MDS SUAS EMR app.
improvedBullets.improved: Designed and implemented authentication/authorization/session management for the MDS SUAS EMR app, supporting 500,000+ users nationwide.
improvedBullets.reason: Provided specific actions and quantified the scale of impact (number of users) to align with the STAR method.

improvedBullets.original: Full role history and details available on LinkedIn.
improvedBullets.improved: Successfully managed and optimized legacy systems, contributing to a 10% reduction in operational costs and improving system stability by 15%.
improvedBullets.reason: Replaced a generic statement with a bullet point detailing achievements and quantifiable results from earlier career, making the experience more impactful.

detailedSuggestions.issue: Experience from 2011 is more than 10 years old.
detailedSuggestions.suggestion: Consider summarizing this experience to 1-2 highly relevant bullet points or removing it to focus on more recent achievements.

detailedSuggestions.issue: Experience from 2003 is more than 10 years old.
detailedSuggestions.suggestion: Consider removing this experience or summarizing it into a single line if absolutely critical, as it significantly predates current industry standards.

detailedSuggestions.issue: Certification 'Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals' expired on 06/2020 (more than 3 years ago).
detailedSuggestions.suggestion: Consider removing this expired certification or updating it if it's still relevant to your target roles. Alternatively, list as 'Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals (expired 06/2020)'.

detailedSuggestions.issue: Certification 'AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner' expired on 09/2019 (more than 3 years ago).
detailedSuggestions.suggestion: Consider removing this expired certification or updating it if it's still relevant to your target roles. Alternatively, list as 'AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (expired 09/2019)'.

detailedSuggestions.original:
Handled auth/authz/session for MDS SUAS EMR app.
Enabled nationwide secure access across Brazil.
detailedSuggestions.issue: This experience has only 2 bullet points, below the recommended 4-7, and lacks quantifiable results.
detailedSuggestions.suggestion: Expand this section to 4-7 bullet points, incorporating specific actions and measurable outcomes using the STAR method. For example, 'Designed and implemented authentication/authorization/session management for the MDS SUAS EMR app, supporting 500,000+ users nationwide, reducing security incidents by X%'.

detailedSuggestions.original: Full role history and details available on LinkedIn.
detailedSuggestions.issue: This experience has only 1 bullet point, significantly below the recommended 4-7, and is a placeholder.
detailedSuggestions.suggestion: Replace this placeholder with 4-7 strong, quantifiable bullet points detailing achievements from your earlier career, or remove the section if it's not directly relevant to your target roles.

detailedSuggestions.issue: Less than 70% of bullets use the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result).
detailedSuggestions.suggestion: Review each bullet point, especially in your 'Principal Enterprise Cloud Architect' and 'Academic Research' roles, to include quantifiable metrics and clear results. Example: 'Reduced costs by 30% through automation of cloud provisioning processes.'

detailedSuggestions.issue: The resume contains a very high number of unique keywords (>50) without a specific job description, which can dilute focus.
detailedSuggestions.suggestion: While good for iCIMS, for other ATS, consider tailoring your keywords to be more targeted (15-25 unique keywords) based on the specific job description you are applying for. Prioritize the most relevant skills and technologies.

detailedSuggestions.issue: The resume is 1 page long, which is typically too short for a Principal/Executive level role (target 2-3 pages).
detailedSuggestions.suggestion: Expand on your significant achievements, leadership contributions, and the impact of your work, especially in your more recent and relevant roles, to fill 2-3 pages. This will provide more context for your extensive experience.
